Only pride leads to conflict, both with God and other people. They favored their own understanding over God’s revealed will. People deny the Scriptures are the word of God because they have decided not to follow its rules. When people insist on sinning, they attribute bad motives to even good actions. These Jews abandoned their land and removed themselves from God's protection. It is a mistake for people to often ruin themselves by misguided attempts to improve their circumstances.

God can find his people wherever they are. The spirit of prophecy was not limited to the land of Israel. It was foretold that Nebuchadnezzar would destroy and carry many Egyptians into captivity. In this way, God uses one wicked person or nation as a punishment for another. He will punish those who deceive his followers or tempt them to rebel.
